subject: Create Base UI Components
description: Create src/components/ui/Button.tsx with variants (primary, secondary, outline, ghost, danger), sizes (sm, md, lg), loading state, disabled state, full accessibility props (accessibilityRole='button', accessibilityState). Create src/components/ui/Input.tsx with label, error message, multiline support, secure text entry option, themed styling. Create src/components/ui/Card.tsx with elevation, padding variants, pressable option. Create src/components/ui/Text.tsx with variants (body, caption, heading, display) mapping to typography tokens. Create src/components/ui/Spinner.tsx for loading states. Create src/components/ui/ColorPicker.tsx with preset palette of 12 colors + custom hex input. Create src/components/ui/index.ts barrel export. All components must use theme tokens for styling via StyleSheet.create.
result_summary:
Created 6 base UI components with full theming and accessibility support:

1. **Button.tsx**: Variants (primary, secondary, outline, ghost, danger), sizes (sm, md, lg), loading/disabled states, full accessibility props (accessibilityRole='button', accessibilityState)

2. **Input.tsx**: Label, error message, helper text, multiline support, secure text entry, disabled state, themed styling

3. **Card.tsx**: Elevation variants (none/sm/md/lg using shadows), padding variants (none/sm/md/lg), pressable option with press feedback

4. **Text.tsx**: Variants (body, bodySmall, caption, heading, headingSmall, display, label) mapping to typography tokens, color options (default, secondary, muted, primary, error, success, warning), bold/center modifiers

5. **Spinner.tsx**: Small/large sizes, optional loading message, center and fullScreen modes, accessibility support

6. **ColorPicker.tsx**: 12-color preset palette + custom hex input, validation, preview swatch, toggleable custom input section

All components use theme tokens via StyleSheet.create. Updated tsconfig.json to support both @/alias and @/alias/* path patterns for cleaner imports. TypeScript passes with no errors.
